items.value: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the specific requirement of validating the persona scenario of 'Walk-in to checked-in under 30 seconds'. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there are no concrete traces or snapshots captured to support this validation.
